# Blueberry Media

> Blueberry Media is a UK-based LinkedIn thought leadership agency for B2B founders and executives. We turn 45-minute recorded conversations into weeks of LinkedIn content that builds authority, trust, and commercial pipeline.

## About

Blueberry Media is founded and led by Josh Huggins, based in Hungerford, Berkshire. We work with a small number of B2B founders, consultants, and senior executives who want to build a consistent, credible LinkedIn presence without the time burden of writing content themselves.

Our process is built around recorded conversations. We extract your thinking, language, and point of view, then shape it into posts that sound exactly like you — because they come directly from you.

## Services

- Done-for-you LinkedIn content: bi-weekly content calls, 3 to 4 posts per week, profile optimisation, monthly reporting
- Newsletter writing and publishing
- LinkedIn outreach management
- Video clip scripts and production support
- Thought leadership strategy and content pillars

Packages start from £600 per month. All packages are monthly rolling with no long-term contracts.

## Who we work with

- B2B founders and owner-directors
- Independent consultants and advisors
- Senior executives and C-suite leaders
- Sales leaders (VPs of Sales, Sales Directors, Client Directors)
- Fractional executives (CFOs, CMOs, COOs, CTOs)
- Professional services leaders (law, accountancy, consultancy partners)
- Primarily UK-based, also working with clients internationally
